name: J1939TestChkCreate_RTSCTSViolation
title: J1939TestChkCreate_RTSCTSViolation
syntax: long J1939TestChkCreate_RTSCTSViolation(dword senderAddr, dword receiverAddr, dword timeouts[5], dword options);
description: Observes the RTS/CTS transport protocol. It is possible to observer all RTS/CTS transmissions or only the transmission of a specific send node.
